title: hieracium pallescens subsp. neilreichii
intro: Hieracium pallescens subsp. neilreichii, also known as Neilreich's hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium pallescens subsp. neilreichii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential and potential side effects.
